value.found_quote:
Use IAM agent identity
Learn how to use Identity Access Management (IAM) agent identity to provide security and access management features with Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "IAM agent identity" as a feature that provides "security and access management features with Agent Platform," which directly matches the claim. The page is marked as "Preview" ("This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'"), so the lifecycle status is preview rather than active.
